title: 読書少女と秘密の作戦会議

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy and Sweep Tosho are in a cafe
holding a strategy meeting about their project for
Reading Week.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's with that giant stack of paper?! Is that
some kind of magic tome?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
No... These are just some materials I've put
together on the selling points of books I picked
out.
choice_data_list:
The sheer volume, though... I think it's going to
be a hard sell.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No one's gonna wanna look through all that!
You've gotta keep it short and sweet, like Granny
does!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You think so?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Granny used to show me all her magic spells! Like
one that changed the color of flowers, or this
other one that made a dove come flying out of a
box.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Seeing them for myself made them way easier to
understand than if I'd had to read through some
big ol' spellbook. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I see...
choice_data_list:
It might be a good idea to let people
experience the selling points themselves.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, if we're going to do that... Why don't we do
something that recreates memorable moments
from some of the books?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I like it! It'll make people feel like they're inside
the books! Sounds fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we've decided what we're going to do! All
we need to do now is...
choice_data_list: Find an enticing way to promote it?
Figure out how to enhance the atmosphere?
We should think hard about the costumes too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Good point. It won't matter how much effort we
put into the exhibition if nobody comes to see it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If we go somewhere with a lot of foot traffic... we
might be able to find some good examples to use
as reference.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so, we settle our bill and take a stroll
outside the cafe.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Handing out flyers and calling out to people seem
to be the tried-and-true methods... but we need
something extra that'll grab people's attention.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It's Magical ☆ Derby Girl! I can't believe
she's really here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Did you just say Derby Girl?! Where is she?! Where?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: S-Sweep?! Wait a second!

text_block_list.name: Witch-Costumed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Catch Derby Girl doing her thing at the marvelously ☆ majestic ♪ Magical Derby Girl Returns show! ☆

text_block_list.name: Witch-Costumed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everybody! I hope to see you all in the
audience soon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go! There's no way I'm missing this!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, we're all going! Let's go see the Derby Girl show together!
choice_data_list:
What about looking for examples on how to
promote the exhibit?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sure it'll be fine! Besides, we just saw a great
example...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well... I was just thinking we could try doing what
Derby Girl did.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Instead of just talking to people, why don't we
dress up as characters from the books? I think
that'd really grab people's attention!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It might be a little embarrassing... but if we try it
somewhere crowded like the central plaza, I'm
sure it'll work!
choice_data_list: I think so too. Let's try it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Me too! Me too! I'd be happy to help out if it
means I can dress up as a magical girl. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now we can enjoy the Derby Girl show
guilt-free! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(If you two are with me, I'm sure it'll work out...
Let's make sure everyone knows how exciting our
event will be!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're right. The exhibition would be even more
immersive if we really made it feel like a living,
breathing story!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Atmosphere... But how do we enhance something
we can't see or touch or anything?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Is that you, Cafe?! And you're drinking tea! That's
not like you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah. I thought you were the black coffee
type?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on?! A power outage?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah! Thank goodness, the lights are—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Eek! Again?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clatter, clatter!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Eeeeeek! Something's making a weird noise this
time!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I wonder if everything's back to normal now...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ah... You guys are also here?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Y-yes...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Cafe? Did you just come in?
choice_data_list: So that person we saw just now was...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... I think we might want to stay away from
that cafe for a little while...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What the heck was that?! It wasn't even a haunted
house! Why did all that happen?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It was like we were in a horror novel or—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... Maybe we could make the experience more
atmospheric with stage effects? We could use
lights and sounds, like what happened just now!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That was f-frightening, but... I suppose it gave us
some good ideas.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but still! I never want to go through
anything like that again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the two Umamusume still trembling,
the three of us head home.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Right. Our outfits might be just as important as
our exhibit.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If I go to an exhibition on stories about
magic, I wanna see a magical girl there!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it... There was a concert outfit
that looked like it would be right at home in a
fantasy world.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's use that! How about the other
costumes? Should we rent them from somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I think Fuji might be able to help us! She
knows quite a lot about costumes!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
She used to be a child actor, so she might be able
to recommend a place with a bunch of stage
costumes we could use!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I see... Well, it certainly sounds like you're going
to make this year's Reading Week one to
remember!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If it's costumes you're after, I'll set you up with
someone I know. I'm sure they'll have quite a
selection.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yay! Hey, you've been a big help! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can't bear to see my darling ponies looking
troubled when they're trying their very best... I
shall spare no effort in keeping your smiles right
side up.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah... Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
F-Fuji... I'm not sure why, but my heart always
starts pounding when you say things like that...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Perhaps it's because I wish to make your heart beat faster.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
A single line can greatly impact the emotions of
those who hear it. Whether it is delivered on
stage or in simple conversation matters not.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Actors perform by envisioning the sort of
character they're playing, how they feel, and what
exactly they wish to convey.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This ensures that the audience will find
themselves drawn into the world of the story.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The world... of the story...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would you mind telling us more? I want to
hear about the principles of performance!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the event will be even more wonderful if
we can truly inhabit our characters!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
With pleasure! If it's for darling ponies who
appreciate a good story, I shall assist in any way I
can.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki shares her acting knowledge, and I find
myself feeling a little smarter for having listened
to her.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...So that's what I'm thinking—an exhibition
focused on spreading the allure of stories.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I want to show everyone what makes books
special... I don't want to let these wonderful
stories be overlooked!

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant A
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I think that could really get people
excited.

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant B
text_block_list.text:
Right... It sounds pretty tough, but I think I wanna
try it. I want to share my favorite books with
people too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sold on Zenno Rob Roy's sheer passion, the
library helpers settle on her idea for the event. All
that's left now is to prepare.
